mnemonics: RESOURCE M.A.P. (for types of resources: MOOCs, Articles, Papers)
keyPoints: Utilize online MOOCs (Massive Open Online Courses) from platforms like Coursera and edX for structured learning.
Read foundational research papers from conferences like NeurIPS and ICML to understand cutting-edge AI theory.
Follow AI blogs and articles from industry leaders (e.g., OpenAI, DeepMind) for practical applications and news.
commonMistakes: Relying solely on one type of resource (e.g., only videos) instead of a balanced mix of papers, courses, and practical tutorials.
Getting overwhelmed by advanced research papers without first building a foundation through beginner-friendly courses and textbooks.
